what: Call backend import flow and stream progress via SSE
why: The backend handles filesystem scanning, frontmatter parsing, and DB registration

transitions.on_error: show error state with retry option

success_handling.criteria: Backend processes all selected files and the SSE completed event is received with imported and skipped counts
success_handling.transition: show done state with imported and skipped counts

error_handling.description: Backend encountered errors processing files — show failed count and allow retry
Backend is unreachable — show generic network error with retry option
